name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Rest a barbell on your upper back (trapezius), keeping your chest up and feet shoulder-width apart.
Descend by bending at your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive back up to the starting position.

name: Barbell Squats
instructions: Squat down and push back up.

name: Hex Bar Jump Squat
instructions: Step inside the hex bar and grasp the handles.
Perform a rapid countermovement, then jump explosively into the air.

name: Dumbbell Single-Leg Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand with one foot resting behind you on a bench.
Hold dumbbells in your hands and bend the front knee to descend.
Drive back up using the front leg.

name: Single-Leg Hamstring Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with one foot on the floor and the other leg extended.
Drive your hips up, squeezing the hamstrings.
